description: New tools/lib/schema-types/generate.mjs: minimal JSON-Schema→TypeScript-declaration emitter (objects, enums, arrays, $ref within schemas/ — no external dep), writing tools/lib/schema-types/*.d.ts for every schemas/*.json. npm script types:gen; CI asserts output is committed and current (git diff --exit-code after regen). Tools import these types via JSDoc @type imports as files convert.

evidence.output_tail: schema type declarations are current (13 schemas)

title: Generate .d.ts types from schemas/ (single source of truth)
